/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/c1_driver/msg/detail/velinfo__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/c1_driver/msg/detail/velquery__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
